title: Connect requested operation to policy evaluation
rawUserRequest: 执行项目校准与更新重新校准计划工单 5：使 requestedOperation 进入 Policy Evaluation，并串联 Critical Domain、Capability、Preflight、实际 Diff 与一致性检查；继续串行执行但不启动工单 1。

declaredIntent.summary: Make requested operation policy evaluation authoritative and traceable across governance gates.

sources.reason: Canonical allowlist for requested operation combinations.
Policy Evaluation and capability evidence consumer.

riskAssessment.reason: The policy vocabulary and evidence chain are deterministic and repository-local.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized serial execution of this bounded governance Work Item.

preReviewWarnings: Verify policy-disallowed combinations, missing authority evidence, and declared-vs-diff mismatches fail closed.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: requestedOperation combinations are evaluated from a canonical policy that covers all five required fields.
Policy-disallowed combinations and missing authority evidence fail closed with policy and contract evidence.
Actual Diff ownership and consistency checks remain connected, with regression tests and documentation proving the chain.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: requestedOperation is validated structurally but its allowlist is embedded in code, so policy provenance and cross-gate consistency are not explicit.
constraints: Keep the existing fail-closed behavior and capability mapping.
Do not add production or critical-domain permissions.
Do not start Work Item 1 or later Work Items.
intent.rationale: A repository policy must be the single auditable source for operation combinations consumed by the Trust Guard.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized serial execution of the recalibration plan, including this policy, guard, diff, test, and documentation Work Item.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
